title: ruizterania nitida
intro: Ruizterania nitida, also known as the 'nitida plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Ruizterania nitida is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, and it may also be used topically as an ointment or salve.
